changes.description: add probe-inapplicability rationalizations to NO-BYPASS RULE — close IPC/main-process/code-analysis-is-definitive bypass paths in adhoc-workflow
add ops-only guard — source file modifications can never be classified as ops-only to avoid probe in adhoc-workflow
add probe-inapplicability and ops-only misclassification prohibitions to builder.md gate
fix stale Autonomous Auth Resolution reference to Auth Resolution Escalation in adhoc-workflow
add design decision detection (Step 0.1c) with planning considerations integration to adhoc-workflow (PRD adhoc-design-decisions US-001/US-003)
add design decision questions UI with lettered options and skip detection for trivial tasks (PRD adhoc-design-decisions US-002/US-006)
add IMPLEMENTATION DECISIONS section to ANALYSIS COMPLETE dashboard (PRD adhoc-design-decisions US-004)
add implementation decisions to Task Spec acceptance criteria and mandatory Playwright analysis confirmation (PRD adhoc-design-decisions US-005/US-007)
merge test-quality-checks and test-activity-resolution into test-flow (~698 lines), delete merged skills (PRD adhoc-design-decisions US-008)
replace inline quality checks in adhoc-workflow with test-flow reference, 232-line reduction (PRD adhoc-design-decisions US-009)
replace inline quality checks in prd-workflow with skill references, 439-line reduction (PRD adhoc-design-decisions US-010)
replace builder.md verification pipeline with single test-flow call, 43-line reduction (PRD adhoc-design-decisions US-011)
remove isUIProject() gate — all projects get full Playwright verification across 7 files (PRD adhoc-design-decisions US-012)
add unified activeWork state model to builder-state.schema.json, remove activePrd/activeTask/adhocQueue (PRD adhoc-design-decisions US-014)
add mandatory Story Processing Pipeline to builder.md, migrate all state references to activeWork (PRD adhoc-design-decisions US-015)
add [F] flow chart option to ANALYSIS COMPLETE dashboards in adhoc-workflow and prd-workflow (PRD adhoc-design-decisions US-016)
add activeWork session resume dashboard with failed/in-progress story handling to builder.md and builder-state (PRD adhoc-design-decisions US-017)
split ANALYSIS COMPLETE dashboard into separate Recommended Approach and Alternatives sections in adhoc-workflow
remove skipped from builder.md probe gate — accept only confirmed, partially-confirmed, user-skipped (PRD mandatory-probe-enforcement US-001)
remove Electron-specific qualifier from builder.md prohibitions — universal never-skip language (PRD mandatory-probe-enforcement US-002)
replace Skip Conditions with Mandatory Enforcement section in test-ui-verification (PRD mandatory-probe-enforcement US-003)
remove skipped from probe results tables, add user-skipped in test-ui-verification (PRD mandatory-probe-enforcement US-004)
expand NO-BYPASS RULE with invalid rationalizations table and mandatory resolutions in adhoc-workflow (PRD mandatory-probe-enforcement US-005)
remove skipped from probe results processing, add user-skipped in adhoc-workflow (PRD mandatory-probe-enforcement US-006)
replace probe-was-skipped dashboard handling with mandatory enforcement statement in adhoc-workflow (PRD mandatory-probe-enforcement US-007)
remove skipped from dashboard display table, add user-skipped in adhoc-workflow (PRD mandatory-probe-enforcement US-008)
add contradicted → re-probe loop (max 2 attempts) in adhoc-workflow (PRD mandatory-probe-enforcement US-009)
add contradicted as gate-blocking status with state machine documentation in builder.md (PRD mandatory-probe-enforcement US-010)
remove agents.analysisProbe config option from test-ui-verification and adhoc-workflow, keep analysisProbeTimeoutMs (PRD mandatory-probe-enforcement US-011)
replace Autonomous Auth Resolution with Auth Resolution Escalation with user-assisted [S]/[H]/[C] prompt in adhoc-workflow (PRD mandatory-probe-enforcement US-012)
add 6-step auth escalation ladder with user assistance to test-ui-verification (PRD mandatory-probe-enforcement US-013)
add ops-only task classification (source-change / ops-with-runtime-impact / ops-only) to adhoc-workflow analysis phase
add mandatory VERIFICATION PLAN section to ANALYSIS COMPLETE dashboard in adhoc-workflow with ops-only example
add post-ops verification checkpoint (Step 1.2a) to adhoc-workflow for ops-only tasks with runtime impact
add ops-only task verification (Step 7) to Verification Pipeline Resolution for browser-visible ops fixes
replace playwright-required config gate with automatic UI project detection via isUIProject() in test-ui-verification (PRD mandatory-playwright-between-stories US-003)

add Playwright installation check with install/skip prompt and session caching to prd-workflow (PRD mandatory-playwright-between-stories US-005)
add story-scoped Playwright test selection with 1-hop dependency edges to prd-workflow (PRD mandatory-playwright-between-stories US-006)
